name: Darwinbox
description: Unified platform for goal setting, feedback, reviews, and career development powered by AI insights. Learn more about Darwinbox

reviews.review_title: It is revolutionized by talent management in the cloud
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: This platform is a state-of-the-art HR tool that offers a wide variety of features that make talent management easier and more efficient.
reviews.review_pros: This platform has made my job as a human resources manager much easier, allowing me to manage almost everything from one place in the cloud and the interface is quite friendly and easy to navigate.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes I find it a bit difficult to navigate the platform, especially when it comes to customizing it to meet my specific needs.

reviews.review_description: Overall experience is good, Attendance tracker to track absentism on company level, Profile details of all the employees can be tracked easily. Leaves can be applied and approved on internal level between teams
reviews.review_pros: Reimbursemrnt feature is good, no difficulties and very simple process to claim reimbursement. Ease and clean Interface which is quite user friendly. Profile details of every employee can be checked to reach out to them if required.
reviews.review_cons: There can be attendance reminder or alert notification when we open app or web. Most ppl forget to checkin on time.

reviews.review_title: A great software but needs some improvement
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It's been more than 6 months we are in touch with the team. There are some areas where software needs some improvement however the real time base update of the records is really helpful
reviews.review_pros: The interface is very appealing and user friendly
reviews.review_cons: The reporting and restrictions are not there

reviews.review_title: Complete tool for HRMS and PMS needs
reviews.review_description: It was good, and we can kept the time sheet as well
reviews.review_pros: PMS things liked most, we can add and delete KRA and KPIs very easily
reviews.review_cons: I like most PMS, employee HRMS and Employee engagement things

reviews.review_description: I have been using Darwinbox HR for almost 2 years at my organization now. It is pretty easy to adapt and work on the leave application, employee appraisal with seamlessly managing multiple stakeholders. The only issue I have noticed is sometimes the website loads slowly and few UI issues in the mobile application. I would say it has been a very good experience on an overall level. For a Medium to Large scale industry Darwinbox can be quite useful.b
reviews.review_pros: (+) Easy leave application and tracking. (+) Seamless employee appraisal and review mechanism. (+) Many interesting features like internal job postings, employee referral systems are available.
reviews.review_cons: (-) Sometimes the website is not very interactive, slows down. (-) UI problems in the mobile application.

reviews.review_title: Best HRMS solution in premium category
reviews.review_pros: 1. Easy to use 2. Clean user interface 3. Easily adoptable by employee 4. Provide end number of features 5. Attendence and leave dashboard are best
reviews.review_cons: Front dashboard can be improved more because in indutry company offers entire information at one single page.

reviews.review_pros: DarwinBox has a good interface and is rich in functionalities and features
reviews.review_cons: Web application has more features than mobile app while the users would like to use mobile app more which makes it very annoying. Also, reimbursement module needs improvement in terms of workflow and use-cases handled

reviews.review_title: One platform for all HR function
reviews.review_description: Overall my experience is very good with this software as I find all the HR function which we needed and it helps us to run business in most effective way and also help us in increasing employee productivity as analysis are easy with this software.
reviews.review_pros: This software help me from Hire to retire of an employee as it has all the function which is required by HR department Like recruitment (from screening to automatic offer letter generation) , Task assignment, Payroll management, Time management (attendance and leave) and other. Best thing it has face recognition attendance system and also help you in digital onboarding. All function you can use on your mobile as well.
reviews.review_cons: I don't think support team should be more supportive so they can help us and resolve our query.

reviews.review_description: overall it's a very helpful and great tool,I will suggest it
reviews.review_pros: Darwinbox is a convenient tool that allows me to mark my attendance, submit reimbursement requests, check my leave balance, access HR documents, and view my compensation details.
reviews.review_cons: there is nothing wrong with this application

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Darwinbox makes me easy to manage, view report by only mobile apps.
reviews.review_pros: The most impactful feature is the apps is focus on mobile apps. We can change, reporting or get analytic from mobile apps.
reviews.review_cons: I think the support from company must be increasing.

reviews.review_pros: Me parece muy buen aplicativo ya que cuenta con una gran variedad de herramientas en su interfas.
reviews.review_cons: Me parece que se debe mejorar la vercion de escritorio para generar un mejor rendimiento.

reviews.review_title: HR tool that is very simple and easy to use
reviews.review_pros: Very easy tool to integrate into current systems and train staff to use for everyday tasks and situations
reviews.review_cons: Can be slightly pricey compared to competitors

reviews.review_pros: Pros of Darwinbox: -Easy Policy Mgmt -Easy Attendance Mgmt
reviews.review_cons: Cons of Darwnbox: - User Interface glitches sometimes

reviews.review_title: Decent program but doesn't replace the human touch
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It is an efficient program and handles many of the day to day jobs of your HR department fairly well.
reviews.review_cons: The customer support leaves a lot to be desired and they're not always available. Ultimately it was unable to replace the human touch.

reviews.review_pros: What I liked most about Darwinbox is how simple and organized the software is. It has a user-friendly interface that makes navigation easy, and its streamlined features allow for efficient management of HR tasks. Everything feels intuitive, which helps save time and reduce complexity for users.
reviews.review_cons: What I liked least about Darwinbox is that the UI and UX could have been more dynamic and modernized. While the design is functional, it feels a bit basic, and adding more animations or contemporary design elements could enhance the user experience, making it feel more engaging and visually appealing.

reviews.review_title: One of the great product in HRMS
reviews.review_description: well, overall it is really a nice tool and value for money
reviews.review_pros: Setting up a goals for a reportees and tracking is excellent.
reviews.review_cons: Calenders and Leaves section is needed a improvements.

reviews.review_title: Managing life cycle of an employee
reviews.review_description: Earlier we were using HR Mantra which was easy for tracking your attendance and leaves but it lacked some major areas where one can use it for their benefits. With Darwinbox this has never been an issue, it almost provides every available feature for an employee to make sure they can utilise the HR Management without any issue.
reviews.review_pros: Darwin box is basically equipped with all the features that are required by an organization to manage an employee's life cycle. The software is easy to use and enables to use it for multiple purposes be it for managing attendance or onboarding details. It has every information related to a person be it payroll wise, department wise or performance wise.
reviews.review_cons: Darwinbox is equipped with multiple features which are good but sometimes it becomes too complex to check for specific things and I find it difficult as the UI is not to pleasant. The payslip is also a major setback that it possess, maybe my organization hasn't utilised that feature but I have to use another tool to check my monthly payslip which I would prefer to check it on Darwinbox itself.

reviews.review_title: The HR Software that all of my employeers have used
reviews.review_pros: There are a few good things about DarwinBox. 1. It has a good mobile application. 2. It is customizable. 3. Marking the attendance and requesting leaves is easy peasy.
reviews.review_cons: One thing I find the worse is that everyone can access anyone's details in the organization. Like my number is shared with people whom I don't want to share my details with.

reviews.review_pros: Flexible, customized various HR related workflow
reviews.review_cons: Permission role access is limited to one role. It should allow the user to have access/ permission right of multiple modules

reviews.review_title: Best software for Attendance and Reimbursement
reviews.review_description: I have been using this application for more than a year. It is one of the software that i have to use daily. I mark my attendance, submit my reimbursement, check for my leaves, access to all my HR documents, compensation details, and best part we can find our internal employees in the employee section using their Employee ID. Not only this it keeps me updated on all the events happening in the organisation including birthday's and anniversaries.
reviews.review_pros: There are many features to like about this software. The attendance can be marked very easily and smoothly. We can even check the leave calender. The interface is very easy to navigate and understandable. It is user friendly.
reviews.review_cons: There is nothing I dislike almost every feature is very useful and is required for smooth functioning our work.

reviews.review_description: Good as a beginner, Can be good option for a larger multinations.
reviews.review_pros: It captures details process and follows it to the T Good for growing organisations, when I used it DrawinBox team was flexible and willing to customize the features
reviews.review_cons: Complicated process to set-up Not agile system i.e. once you set it up no flexibility of changing the process

reviews.review_description: Overall experience will be good with Darwinbox
reviews.review_pros: Daily attendance marking is with this software only. Location marking will be used so no fake attendance will be marked. Taskbox, Attendance, Leave, Performance, HR documents, Recruitment, Calender, Helpdesk, Workflow and Events option will be avaialble. It is very easy to use and convenient also
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes location will be go somewhere else. This is the only negative feedback

reviews.review_description: Darwinbox has been very convenient for me to use due to its simple user interface, and it has solved all HR problems for us.
reviews.review_pros: The attendance marking and tracking system of Darwinbox is very reliable as it records the location coordinates of the candidate and is also enabled on the mobile app. Moreover, Payroll management and coordination with team-members on incentive payout is much easy to monitor, ensuring transparency at each level.
reviews.review_cons: Goal setting and tracking is slightly difficult as manually performance has to be updated at fixed intervals, and it is not possible to mark past achievements later.

reviews.review_description: I have all positive praises about Darwin box its save my time related HR
reviews.review_pros: Darwin box is very easy to use like fresher employee can start it to use from first day.I am using this app in my organization to update my attendance for apply leave, approve leave etc. Darwin box also help to get updated yourself with your organization new launched policy.
reviews.review_cons: Mobile application is good. I am not satisfied with desktop version. Need to improve stability and visualization. in HR Document Tool all documents are in un-even numbers should to improve in indexing.

reviews.review_title: Best software for Attendance & Goal Tracking
reviews.review_description: As mentioned in Pros, I just want to say that, I found it very useful and I liked this one a lot.
reviews.review_pros: I'm using DarwinBox for more than 1 year and found it easy to use. It helps me in attendance tracking, my check in and check outs. Also, I can see all my holidays and leaves I have taken and I planned for future. It helps me in achieve my goals. It helps me out in understanding HR Policies.
reviews.review_cons: I haven't found such an issue that can be described as a Cons. But I found some problems while using DarwinBox. It doesn't notifies the user when a leave is accepted by Manager.
